markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Jaime Faria wins set 4 in the Zizou Bergs vs Jaime Faria professional tennis match in the 2026 Wimbledon Men Singles Round Of 64, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Zizou Bergs vs Jaime Faria professional tennis match in the 2026 Wimbledon Men Singles Round Of 64. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks). If a retirement occurs, all markets that can be unconditionally settled based on play already completed will resolve accordingly. Any markets that cannot be unconditionally settled will resolve to Fair Market Price, as determined at the sole discretion of the Exchange.
markets.title: Will Jaime Faria win set 4 in the Zizou Bergs vs Jaime Faria match

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Xaver Schlager starts for Austria in the Spain vs Austria FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 2, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Resolution is based on the lineup and players on the field when the match begins. If a player is not included in the initially announced starting lineup but is in the official starting lineup at kickoff and on the field when play begins, the market resolves Yes. If a player is named in the starting lineup but is replaced or withdrawn before kickoff, the market resolves No. Substitute appearances do not count. If this game does not occur before Jul 3, 2026, all markets resolve to No.
markets.title: Will Xaver Schlager start for Austria?
